title: rubus × fallaciosus
intro: Rubus × fallaciosus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a cross between the American black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the purple raspberry (Rubus idaeus), resulting in a unique and flavorful fruit-bearing plant. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant content, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × fallaciosus include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and aid in the management of digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried leaf and root infusions, as well as fresh fruit extracts, which can be used to create jams, preserves, and other edible products.
